documentation.description:
------------
 Defaults --
------------
  These functions are used by default for log decoration.
  They take the log message and modify it somehow.

variables.name: Level_Decorator

documentation.description: Use simple text prefixes for normal levels, markers for verbose levels.

variables.name: Location_Decorator
variables.code:
Location_Decorator : access function (Entity,
                                      Location,
                                      Message : String) return String :=
  No_Location_Decorator'Access;

documentation.description:
No entity/location information by default.
See Simple_Location_Decorator above for a "[entity] (location) Msg" option.

subprograms.name: Default_Level_Decorator

documentation.description: Prefixes the log message with ERROR/Warning/(nothing)/->/-->>.

subprograms.name: No_Location_Decorator

documentation.description: Does not use the location/entity information, Message is kept as-is.

subprograms.name: Simple_Location_Decorator

documentation.description:
Prefixes the log message with fixed-with entity/location.
Uses the previous two declared variables for the width.
